personas.name: Successful Sleepers/Stress Relievers
personas.description: Using the Calm App succesfully to allow them to fall asleep and/or manage their stress more easily
goals: Use guided meditation to manage daily stress and anxiety
Fall asleep faster using sleep stories and soundscapes
Maintain a consistent mindfulness and relaxation routine
pain_points: Background nature sounds occasionally drown out the narrator's voice
Breathing exercise sessions are interrupted when the app is minimised
context: Using the app at bedtime to wind down
Using the app during stressful moments at work or throughout the day
constraints: Sessions must play uninterrupted from start to finish
Audio balance between narrator and background sounds must be consistent

personas.name: Critic
personas.description: Users who values the app but is increasingly frustrated by repetitive content, limited library growth, and difficulty finding specific tracks or soundscapes.
goals: Discover new sleep stories and soundscapes regularly
Easily find specific content types such as thunderstorm or ocean soundscapes
Have enough content variety to avoid repetition over long-term use
pain_points: The same sleep stories repeat too often with little new content added
The content library is difficult to browse and search through
Audio quality issues such as overly loud background sounds reduce enjoyment
context: Using the app nightly and exhausting available sleep stories over time
Searching for specific soundscapes while in a stressed or distressed state
constraints: New content must be added frequently enough to prevent repetition
Content must be easily searchable and well organised

personas.name: Value-Conscious Trialist
personas.description: A new or prospective user who downloaded Calm expecting meaningful free access but felt misled by how aggressively content is locked behind a paywall, leading to frustration and distrust of the app.
goals: Explore the app's features before committing to a subscription
Access at least basic meditation or anxiety relief tools for free
Understand the full cost of the app before being prompted to subscribe
pain_points: Almost all content is locked behind a paywall with little free access
The app does not clearly communicate its pricing upfront
Emergency or anxiety-focused content being paywalled feels exploitative
context: Trying the app for the first time after seeing an advertisement
Looking for free mental health tools and encountering unexpected paywalls
constraints: Pricing and subscription requirements must be transparent before sign-up
A meaningful free tier must exist for users to evaluate the app

personas.name: Billing Problem User
personas.description: A user who encountered serious billing issues such as being charged after cancelling, difficulty obtaining refunds, or unexpected subscription renewals, resulting in distrust and frustration with Calm's support.
goals: Cancel a subscription and stop being charged immediately
Receive a timely refund for unauthorised or unwanted charges
Get responsive and helpful support when billing issues arise
pain_points: Continued to be charged after cancelling a subscription
Refund requests go unanswered for weeks or are outright refused
Customer support is unresponsive or unhelpful when resolving billing disputes
context: Attempting to cancel a free trial before it converts to a paid subscription
Noticing unexpected charges on a bank statement and contacting support
constraints: Cancellation must take effect immediately and stop all future charges
Refund requests must be acknowledged and resolved within a reasonable timeframe

personas.name: App Issues User
personas.description: A user who wants to use Calm, but is consistently blocked or frustrated by technical problems including bugs, broken features, confusing navigation, and poor app performance.
goals: Navigate the app intuitively to find desired content quickly
Use features such as timers, sleep tracking, and audio playback reliably
Experience stable performance without crashes or unexpected behaviour
pain_points: The app crashes or fails to load content on certain devices
Navigation is confusing and makes it hard to find specific features
Notifications interrupt active sessions and cannot be easily disabled
context: Using the app on Android devices where certain features behave unexpectedly
Trying to access a feature mid-session and encountering errors or crashes
constraints: Core features must work reliably across supported Android devices
Navigation must be intuitive enough to use while in a stressed or distressed state
